---
title: "Electrical Single-Line Diagram"
subtitle: "{{< meta project_name >}}"
author: "Generated by electrical-distribution-skill"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
params:
  project_name: "Project Name"
  site: "Site Location"
  revision: "A"
  topology_file: "sld-topology.yaml"
  diagram_file: "sld-diagram.svg"
---

# Executive Summary

This document presents the electrical single-line diagram (SLD) for
**{{< meta params.project_name >}}** at **{{< meta params.site >}}**.

::: {.callout-note}
## Document Status
- **Revision**: {{< meta params.revision >}}
- **Generated**: {{< meta date >}}
- **Status**: FOR ENGINEERING REVIEW - NOT FOR CONSTRUCTION
:::

# System Overview

## Voltage System

| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Primary Voltage | [Extracted from topology] |
| Secondary Voltage | [Extracted from topology] |
| Frequency | 50 Hz / 60 Hz |
| System Grounding | TN-S / TN-C-S / TT |

## Load Summary

| Panel | Connected kW | Demand kW | Feeder Count |
|-------|-------------|-----------|--------------|
| MCC-100 | | | |
| MCC-200 | | | |
| **Total** | | | |

# Single-Line Diagram

## System View

![SLD System View]({{< meta params.diagram_file >}}){#fig-sld-system width="100%"}

## Detailed Views

### MCC-100 Pre-Treatment

[Insert MCC-100 detailed view]

### MCC-200 Biological Treatment

[Insert MCC-200 detailed view]

# Equipment Schedule

## Transformer

| Tag | Rating | Primary | Secondary | Impedance |
|-----|--------|---------|-----------|-----------|
| XFMR-01 | | | | |

## Main Switchboard

| Tag | Type | Rating | SCCR |
|-----|------|--------|------|
| MSB-01 | | | |

## Motor Control Centers

| Tag | Location | Bus Rating | Main Breaker | SCCR |
|-----|----------|------------|--------------|------|
| MCC-100 | | | | |
| MCC-200 | | | | |

# Notes and Disclaimers

1. This diagram is generated from load-list-skill output using PlantUML
2. Not suitable for contractor submission without CAD conversion
3. Protection coordination studies should be performed separately
4. Cable sizing should be verified against project specifications

# Revision History

| Rev | Date | Description | By |
|-----|------|-------------|-----|
| A | | Initial Issue | |

---

*Generated with electrical-distribution-skill and plantuml-sld-mcp-server*
